name: Samsara Inc.
description: Samsara Inc. is a leading provider of the Connected Operations Cloud, a platform that enables businesses that depend on physical operations to harness Internet of Things (IoT) data to develop actionable business insights and improve their operations. The company's solutions combine hardware, software, and cloud services to bring real-time visibility, analytics, and AI-driven insights to operations across industries such as transportation, logistics, construction, utilities, and manufacturing.
